extortion.description: Medway Plastics is a family-owned plastic injection molding company based in California and Texas, specializing in sustainable plastic injection molding and design since 1974. They utilize advanced machinery and tooling to manufacture a diverse range of plastic products, catering to various performance requirements with a focus on sustainability. The company also employs innovative energy solutions, including a co-generation system that generates electricity from natural gas and recycles heat for mold cooling. Medway Plastics serves clients looking for high-quality, custom plastic solutions across multiple industries.
